type_definitions.name: ImplPlanDocumentDto
type_definitions.description: Infrastructure serde DTO for `impl-plan.json`. Mirrors domain::ImplPlanDocument (`schema_version + tasks + plan`) with 1:1 field naming, following the same pattern as track/codec.rs::TrackDocumentV2. The `tasks` field uses `Vec<ImplPlanTaskDto>` and the `plan` field uses `ImplPlanPlanDto` (which wraps `Vec<ImplPlanSectionDto>`); these codec-local DTOs are introduced alongside this type rather than reusing `PlanDocument`/`PlanSectionDocument`/`TrackTaskDocument` from track/codec.rs, so that `deny_unknown_fields` is enforced at every nesting level. Introduced by ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D1.4 / T004.

type_definitions.name: ImplPlanCodecError
type_definitions.description: Public error enum for the impl-plan.json codec. Variants follow existing codec conventions (Json for serde failures; UnsupportedSchemaVersion for version mismatches; Validation for domain construction errors). Introduced alongside the new codec by ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D1.4 / T004.

type_definitions.name: TaskCoverageDocumentDto
type_definitions.description: Infrastructure serde DTO for `task-coverage.json`. Holds four per-section maps (in_scope / out_of_scope / constraints / acceptance_criteria) from SpecElementId to Vec<TaskId>. Mirrors domain::TaskCoverageDocument. Introduced by ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D1.4 / T004.

type_definitions.name: TaskCoverageCodecError
type_definitions.description: Public error enum for the task-coverage.json codec. Variants follow existing codec conventions. Introduced alongside the new codec by ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D1.4 / T004.

type_definitions.name: PlanArtifactRefsError
type_definitions.description: Public error enum for the `sotp verify plan-artifact-refs` CLI verifier (libs/infrastructure/src/verify/plan_artifact_refs.rs). Surfaces ref-field schema / file-existence / anchor-resolution / hash-mismatch / and task-coverage failures as fatal error variants that cause CI failure. Canonical-block suspicion is warning-only per ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D2.3 (details deferred to Q14): it is reported as a `VerifyFinding` (warning-level output), not as an error variant in this enum, so the CLI does not fail on canonical-block suspicion alone. Introduced by ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D2.3 / T010 / T011.

type_definitions.name: TrackDocumentV2
type_definitions.description: Infrastructure serde DTO for `metadata.json` (track/codec.rs). Modified per ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D1.4 / T005: drop `tasks` and `plan` fields (they move to ImplPlanDocumentDto) so the DTO mirrors the new identity-only structure. ADR D1.4 defines the retained fields as `schema_version, id, branch, title, status, created_at, updated_at`; `status` is now stored explicitly rather than task-derived. Whether `status_override` is kept as a separate JSON field or merged into a single `status` value is left to the implementer. `DocumentMeta` fields (`schema_version`, `created_at`, `updated_at`) are retained. Schema version bump is at the implementer's discretion per the no-backward-compat rule.

type_definitions.name: SpecCodecError
type_definitions.description: Public error enum for the spec.json codec (libs/infrastructure/src/spec/codec.rs). Modified by T003 to add `DomainValidation` variant that surfaces `domain::ValidationError` failures produced when plan_ref newtypes (SpecElementId / AdrAnchor / ConventionAnchor / ContentHash / InformalGroundSummary) reject their input during DTO-to-domain conversion. Pre-existing variants (Json / Validation / UnsupportedSchemaVersion / InvalidField) are preserved.

type_definitions.name: ImplPlanTaskDto
type_definitions.description: Nested DTO representing a single task inside `impl-plan.json`. Introduced by T004 (alongside ImplPlanDocumentDto) as a codec-local type rather than reusing `track::codec::TrackTaskDocument` so that `deny_unknown_fields` is enforced at this nesting level. Mirrors the domain `TrackTask` shape (id, description, status, optional commit_hash).

type_definitions.name: ImplPlanPlanDto
type_definitions.description: Nested DTO for the `plan` field of `impl-plan.json`. Introduced by T004 alongside ImplPlanDocumentDto to obtain a codec-local `deny_unknown_fields` contract that the track codec's `PlanDocument` does not provide. Wraps an optional summary list and a section vector of ImplPlanSectionDto.

type_definitions.name: ImplPlanSectionDto
type_definitions.description: Nested DTO for a single plan section inside `impl-plan.json`. Introduced by T004 alongside ImplPlanDocumentDto / ImplPlanPlanDto to propagate `deny_unknown_fields` through the whole impl-plan object tree. Mirrors `domain::PlanSection` (id, title, optional description bullets, task ids).
